Country.name: Country

columns.name: Code
columns.raw_sql: Code VARCHAR(4) CONSTRAINT CountryKey PRIMARY KEY

Country.raw_sql_body:
Name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
 Code VARCHAR(4) CONSTRAINT CountryKey PRIMARY KEY,
 Capital VARCHAR(50),
 Province VARCHAR(50),
 Area DECIMAL,
 Population DECIMAL

City.name: City
City.raw_sql_body:
Name VARCHAR(50),
 Country VARCHAR(4),
 Province VARCHAR(50),
 Population DECIMAL,
 Latitude DECIMAL,
 Longitude DECIMAL,
 Elevation DECIMAL,
 CONSTRAINT CityKey PRIMARY KEY (Name, Country, Province)

Population.name: Population

columns.name: Country
columns.raw_sql: Country VARCHAR(4) CONSTRAINT PopKey PRIMARY KEY

Population.raw_sql_body:
Country VARCHAR(4) CONSTRAINT PopKey PRIMARY KEY,
 Population_Growth DECIMAL,
 Infant_Mortality DECIMAL

Province.name: Province

columns.name: Name
columns.raw_sql: Name VARCHAR(50) CONSTRAINT PrName NOT NULL

columns.name: Country
columns.raw_sql: Country  VARCHAR(4) CONSTRAINT PrCountry NOT NULL

Province.raw_sql_body:
Name VARCHAR(50) CONSTRAINT PrName NOT NULL ,
 Country  VARCHAR(4) CONSTRAINT PrCountry NOT NULL ,
 Population DECIMAL,
 Area DECIMAL,
 Capital VARCHAR(50),
 CapProv VARCHAR(50),
 CONSTRAINT PrKey PRIMARY KEY (Name, Country)

Economy.name: Economy

columns.name: Country
columns.raw_sql: Country VARCHAR(4) CONSTRAINT EconomyKey PRIMARY KEY

Economy.raw_sql_body:
Country VARCHAR(4) CONSTRAINT EconomyKey PRIMARY KEY,
 GDP DECIMAL,
 Agriculture DECIMAL,
 Service DECIMAL,
 Industry DECIMAL,
 Inflation DECIMAL,
 Unemployment DECIMAL

columns.name: Country
columns.raw_sql: Country VARCHAR(4) CONSTRAINT PoliticsKey PRIMARY KEY

Politics.raw_sql_body:
Country VARCHAR(4) CONSTRAINT PoliticsKey PRIMARY KEY,

Continent.name: Continent

columns.name: Name
columns.raw_sql: Name VARCHAR(20) CONSTRAINT ContinentKey PRIMARY KEY

Continent.raw_sql_body:
Name VARCHAR(20) CONSTRAINT ContinentKey PRIMARY KEY,
 Area DECIMAL(10)

borders.name: borders
borders.raw_sql_body:
Country1 VARCHAR(4),
 Country2 VARCHAR(4),
 Length DECIMAL ,
 CONSTRAINT BorderKey PRIMARY KEY (Country1,Country2)

encompasses.name: encompasses
encompasses.raw_sql_body:
Country VARCHAR(4) NOT NULL,

Organization.name: Organization

columns.name: Abbreviation
columns.raw_sql: Abbreviation VARCHAR(12) Constraint OrgKey PRIMARY KEY

Organization.raw_sql_body:
Abbreviation VARCHAR(12) Constraint OrgKey PRIMARY KEY,
 Name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
 City VARCHAR(50) ,
 Country VARCHAR(4) , 
 Province VARCHAR(50) ,
 Established DATE,
 CONSTRAINT OrgNameUnique UNIQUE (Name)

isMember.name: isMember
isMember.raw_sql_body:
Country VARCHAR(4),
 Organization VARCHAR(12),
 Type VARCHAR(60) DEFAULT 'member',
 CONSTRAINT MemberKey PRIMARY KEY (Country,Organization)

Name VARCHAR(50) CONSTRAINT LakeKey PRIMARY KEY,

Sea.name: Sea

River.name: River

columns.name: Name
columns.raw_sql: Name VARCHAR(50) CONSTRAINT RiverKey PRIMARY KEY

River.raw_sql_body:
Name VARCHAR(50) CONSTRAINT RiverKey PRIMARY KEY,
 River VARCHAR(50),
 Lake VARCHAR(50),
 Sea VARCHAR(50),
 Length DECIMAL,
 Area DECIMAL,
 SourceLatitude DECIMAL,
 SourceLongitude DECIMAL,
 Mountains VARCHAR(50),
 SourceElevation DECIMAL,
 EstuaryLatitude DECIMAL,
 EstuaryLongitude DECIMAL,
 EstuaryElevation DECIMAL,
 CONSTRAINT RivFlowsInto 
     CHECK ((River IS NULL AND Lake IS NULL)
            OR (River IS NULL AND Sea IS NULL)
            OR (Lake IS NULL AND Sea is NULL))

RiverThrough.name: RiverThrough
RiverThrough.raw_sql_body:
River VARCHAR(50),
 Lake  VARCHAR(50),
 CONSTRAINT RThroughKey PRIMARY KEY (River,Lake)
